known_solutions.problem: How to structure RFP eligibility scoring
known_solutions.solution: Recommended framework: eliminate ineligible applicants via hard gates before applying weighted scoring

known_solutions.problem: How to score RFP eligibility accurately and efficiently
known_solutions.solution: Recommendation given: check mandatory eligibility criteria as binary pass/fail before applying any weighted scoring rubric
